name: AWS Glossary Reference
description: The central AWS Glossary Reference covering all AWS service terms, security concepts, and cloud computing terminology. Replaces the legacy per-pillar glossaries (e.g., Well-Architected Security Pillar Glossary) which now redirect here.
relationToCloudSecurity: Comprehensive cloud-service-and-security terminology for AWS; includes definitions used across AWS security documentation and architecture guidance.
relationToAISecurity: Includes AI/ML service terminology relevant to AI security posture on AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock, Comprehend, etc.).

license.notes: AWS documentation is generally available under the Amazon Software License for code samples and CC-BY-SA-4.0 for documentation. Verify per page if redistributing.

lifecycle.notes: Replaces the AWS Well-Architected Security Pillar Glossary, which now redirects to this central glossary.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from HTML via extract_aws_glossary.py during glossary phase 2.

extraction_history.reason: Phase 2 retargeting of empty wellarchitected stub to the live central AWS Glossary

notes: Created during glossary phase 2 to replace the wellarchitected-security-glossary entry. The Well-Architected Security Pillar Glossary at docs.aws.amazon.com/wellarchitected/latest/security-pillar/glossary.html is now a stub redirecting to this central glossary; its repo entry is kept as a metadata-only deprecation marker.
